branding.identity: Edunancial is a financial literacy and financial competency membership platform.
branding.longDescription: Edunancial is a membership platform dedicated to improving financial literacy and financial competency through structured learning resources, interactive tools, practical exercises, and technology-supported methods.
branding.publicDisclaimer: Edunancial is not a school, college, university, vocational institution, accredited educational institution, or degree-granting institution. Membership does not result in an academic degree, diploma, professional license, or regulated educational credential.
legal.translationReview: Human legal review recommended before publishing localized legal copy.
selector.defaultPrompt: Would you like to make this your default language?
branding.methodsClarification: Edunancial may use educational methods, including structured learning paths, Socratic questioning, artificial intelligence, repetition, flashcards, quizzes, and practical exercises, solely to help members improve financial literacy and financial competency.
footer.identity: Edunancial is a financial literacy and financial competency membership platform.
footer.subtitle: Financial competency is built through disciplined action.
footer.disclaimer: Edunancial is not a school, college, university, vocational institution, accredited educational institution, or degree-granting institution. Membership does not result in an academic degree, diploma, professional license, or regulated educational credential. Edunancial provides informational content only — not financial, investment, tax, accounting, or legal advice.
faq.label: FAQ
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1.question: What is Edunancial?
faq.q1.answer: Edunancial is a financial literacy and financial competency membership platform. It helps members improve practical financial judgment through learning resources, assessments, tools, and guided support.
faq.q2.question: What do Red, White, and Blue mean?
faq.q2.answer: Red covers Real Estate, White covers Paper Assets, and Blue covers Business. These three pillars remain the foundation of the platform.
faq.q3.question: How do memberships work?
faq.q3.answer: Individual Membership is $24.99/month. Approved Organization Membership is $14.99/member/month for approved partners. The 100+ Member Organization Rate is $9.99 per active paid member/month with a minimum of 100 active paid members and a formal agreement.
faq.q4.question: Is Edunancial a school or accredited institution?
faq.q4.answer: Edunancial is not a school, college, university, vocational institution, accredited educational institution, or degree-granting institution. Membership does not result in an academic degree, diploma, professional license, or regulated educational credential.
faq.q5.question: Can I earn certificates?
faq.q5.answer: Members may receive Certificates of Completion for Edunancial modules. These are completion recognitions only and are not academic degrees, licenses, or regulated credentials.
faq.q6.question: How does Beta Tester access work?
faq.q6.answer: Beta Tester access is $0, invitation only, tied to an approved email address, and begins at first successful login after valid redemption. Access expires 72 hours later unless an administrator explicitly extends it.
contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Contact Edunancial
contact.intro: To keep North America launch support reliable, Edunancial currently publishes only the active inboxes that are monitored today. Use the address that best matches your next step and include your membership email whenever possible.
contact.banner: Department-specific addresses remain under development and are intentionally hidden until they are fully operational.
contact.card1.title: General information
contact.card1.description: Questions about memberships, launch availability, organization access, or the overall Edunancial experience.
contact.card2.title: Customer support
contact.card2.description: Need help with login, checkout readiness, beta access, certificates, course progress, or technical issues? Start here.
aiCoach.label: AI Financial Coach
aiCoach.description: The Edunancial AI Coach helps members move from financial literacy to practical decision-making with guided prompts, course recommendations, and action-oriented follow-up.
home.story.label: Our Story
home.story.heading: Why Edunancial?
home.story.p1: Edunancial began with a simple question between a father and his son: "How do you work with your head?"
home.story.p2: That conversation grew into a system for teaching practical wealth-building across RED for real estate, WHITE for paper assets, and BLUE for business.
home.story.p3: Financial literacy gives people vocabulary. Financial competency helps them use that knowledge with disciplined action, measurable progress, and better decision-making.
home.story.p4: Our mission is to help members move from theory to practical judgment they can apply for life.
home.story.card1.title: Why we exist
home.story.card1.body: To turn financial literacy into applied financial competency.
home.story.card2.title: The mission
home.story.card2.body: Make practical wealth-building knowledge clear, useful, and accessible.
home.story.card3.title: The philosophy
home.story.card3.body: Financial Literacy → Financial Competency → Disciplined Action → Measurable Progress → Wealth Building.
home.hero.title: What is Edunancial?
home.hero.badge1: Invitation-only beta access remains hidden from public pricing
home.hero.badge2: Color-coded learning paths across Red, White, and Blue
home.hero.badge3: AI-guided next steps for better decisions

pricingPage.label: Pricing
pricingPage.title: Membership pricing built for individuals and approved organizations.
pricingPage.intro: Edunancial is a financial literacy and financial competency membership platform. Choose the plan that fits your needs — from free access to individual membership, approved organization rates, and enterprise agreements.
pricingPage.freePlan.name: Free
pricingPage.freePlan.description: Create a free Edunancial account to explore public financial literacy content, track your progress, and access introductory resources at no cost.
pricingPage.enterprisePlan.name: Enterprise
pricingPage.enterprisePlan.description: For large organizations, government agencies, and enterprise partners requiring custom agreements, dedicated support, white-label options, or volume rates beyond standard tiers.
pricingPage.betaNote: Beta Tester access is invitation only, priced at $0, and intentionally hidden from public pricing cards. Minimum pricing for any paid plan is $24.99 per member/month.
membership.label: Membership
membership.title: Become an Edunancial member and build practical financial literacy and financial competency.
membership.block1.title: Learn
membership.block1.body: Structured learning resources across real estate, paper assets, and business.
membership.block2.title: Assess
membership.block2.body: Measure your financial competency and track improvement.
membership.block3.title: Apply
membership.block3.body: Use practical exercises and member tools to convert lessons into decisions.
membership.block4.title: Grow
membership.block4.body: Build habits designed to support long-term financial progress.
cookies.label: Legal & Compliance
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: Edunancial uses cookies and similar technologies to keep the North America site secure, remember preferences, and understand how members navigate the platform.
cookies.category1.title: Functional preferences
cookies.category1.body: Language, region, currency, and experience settings.
cookies.category2.title: Session management
cookies.category2.body: Secure sign-in state and protected member access.
cookies.category3.title: Analytics
cookies.category3.body: Aggregated usage patterns that help us improve launch readiness.
cookies.category4.title: Security
cookies.category4.body: Fraud prevention, rate limiting, and abuse detection controls.
cookies.footer: Third-party services such as analytics, payment, and hosting providers may use their own cookies subject to their separate privacy notices.
privacy.label: Legal & Compliance
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Edunancial collects only the information needed to provide membership services. We never sell your personal information. You have the right to access, correct, or delete your data. We honor requests from California residents under CCPA/CPRA, Canadian residents under PIPEDA, and Quebec residents under Law 25.
privacy.notice: Plain-language summary: we collect account, membership, and support data only as needed to operate the service, secure the platform, and comply with applicable laws.
privacy.section1.title: What we collect
privacy.section1.body: Account registration data, country and region information, membership and billing details handled by processors, learning progress, and support communications.
privacy.section2.title: How we use it
privacy.section2.body: We use personal information to deliver services, secure accounts, process payments, provide support, send transactional notices, and improve the platform.
privacy.section3.title: What we do not do
privacy.section3.body: We do not sell personal information, and we do not use automated decision-making that produces legal or similarly significant effects without human review.
privacy.section4.title: Your rights
privacy.section4.body: Users may request access, correction, deletion, and withdrawal of consent where applicable. California, Canadian, and Quebec residents may have additional rights under local law.
accessibility.label: Accessibility / ADA
accessibility.title: Accessibility Commitment
accessibility.intro: Edunancial is committed to making financial education and member tools accessible to more people across devices, screen sizes, and assistive technologies.
accessibility.item1.title: Accessible layouts
accessibility.item1.body: We prioritize readable contrast, larger touch targets, responsive layouts, and keyboard-friendly navigation in launch-critical areas.
accessibility.item2.title: Feedback path
accessibility.item2.body: If you encounter an accessibility barrier, email support@edunancial.com so we can review and prioritize a fix.
terms.label: Legal
terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.section1.title: 1. Membership Platform Use
terms.section1.body: By using Edunancial, you agree to use the platform only for lawful personal, household, or approved organizational purposes. You may access Edunancial through memberships, approved organizational arrangements, or invitation-only beta access where offered.
terms.section2.title: 2. No Academic or Professional Credential
terms.section2.body: Edunancial is not a school, college, university, vocational institution, accredited educational institution, or degree-granting institution. Membership does not result in an academic degree, diploma, professional license, or regulated educational credential.
terms.section3.title: 3. Financial, Legal, and Tax Disclaimer
terms.section3.body: Edunancial provides informational content only. Nothing on the platform is legal, tax, accounting, investment, insurance, fiduciary, or financial advice, and nothing creates an advisor-client or similar professional relationship.
terms.section4.title: 4. Accounts and Security
terms.section4.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activity under your account. We may suspend or revoke access for fraud, abuse, unauthorized sharing, or violation of these Terms of Use.
terms.section5.title: 5. Payments and Billing
terms.section5.body: Paid membership access is granted only after verified payment confirmation. Approved organization memberships and 100+ member organization rates may require manual review, approval, and formal organizational agreements before access or invoicing begins.
terms.section6.title: 6. Beta Access
terms.section6.body: Beta Tester access is invitation only, personal to the approved email address, single-use, revocable, and limited in duration. See the Beta Terms for additional details.
terms.section7.title: 7. Intellectual Property
terms.section7.body: All Edunancial platform content, software, graphics, assessments, structured learning resources, and other materials are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. No license is granted except for your limited right to access the service as permitted by your membership.
terms.section8.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
terms.section8.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Edunancial is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or for decisions you make using platform content, tools, or outputs.
terms.contactLead: Questions about these Terms of Use can be sent through our
certificates.label: CERTIFICATES
certificates.title: Earn Recognition
certificates.description: Complete every lesson and pass the final quiz to earn your certificate. Certificates are shareable and verifiable.
certificates.availableTemplate: Complete {{count}} lessons to earn this certificate.
certificates.verificationBody: All Edunancial certificates include a unique verification code. Share with employers, partners, and networks to prove your financial competency.
myCertificates.label: MY CERTIFICATES
myCertificates.disclaimer: This certificate recognizes completion of an Edunancial financial literacy or financial competency module. It is not an academic degree, professional license, regulated credential, or evidence of accreditation.
myCertificates.completeCourse: Complete a course and pass the final quiz to earn your certificate.
courseProgress.label: PROGRESS TRACKING
courseProgress.title: Course Progress
memberStories.heading: Real results from real members
memberStories.body: Member experiences and outcomes will be shared here as they are gathered from the community.
memberStories.videoUnsupported: Your browser does not support the video element.
pricingTable.certificateDisclaimer: This certificate recognizes completion of an Edunancial financial literacy or financial competency module. It is not an academic degree, professional license, regulated credential, or evidence of accreditation.
checkout.reviewDetails: Review your membership details before continuing.
checkout.accessVerification: Access is only granted after server-side payment verification. Browser redirects or client-side confirmation screens do not activate membership.
checkout.requiresApproval: This membership requires approval before billing can begin.
checkout.contactSupport: Contact support to confirm eligibility and onboarding requirements.
checkout.signInBeforeCheckout: Sign in before starting checkout so any verified payment can be attached to the correct Edunancial account.
checkout.checkoutUnavailable: Verified online membership checkout is unavailable in the current environment configuration. Confirm Square credentials, webhook signature settings, and the SQUARE_VERIFIED_CHECKOUT_ENABLED flag.
checkout.cancelAnytime: Cancel anytime. No lock-in contracts. Payments stay gated behind verified server-side confirmation.
checkout.accessGranted: Access granted only after verified payment
track.red.title: Learn how wealth is built through real estate.
track.red.overview: RED helps members move from basic property vocabulary to disciplined real-estate decisions across rentals, tax liens, tax deeds, creative finance, and long-term wealth building.
track.red.path.1: Build literacy with foundational RED lessons.
track.red.path.2: Practice deal analysis and financing scenarios.
track.red.path.3: Track progress, complete assessments, and earn certificates.
track.red.comingSoon.1: Expanded tax-lien and tax-deed scenario labs
track.white.title: Build confidence in markets, risk, and portfolio decisions.
track.white.overview: WHITE turns financial literacy into competency across budgeting, stocks, ETFs, options, retirement accounts, and portfolio discipline.
track.white.path.1: Start with budgeting and asset foundations.
track.white.path.2: Practice research, diversification, and risk management.
track.white.path.3: Use progress tracking and certificates to reinforce disciplined action.
track.blue.title: Turn business activity into measurable profit and progress.
track.blue.overview: BLUE helps members learn entrepreneurship, pricing, profit, KPIs, marketing, and systems so business decisions become disciplined and repeatable.
track.blue.path.1: Learn the language of revenue, profit, and customer value.
track.blue.path.2: Practice with KPIs, pricing, and operational systems.
track.blue.path.3: Turn lessons into decisions you can measure over time.
